name: Medicine Pocket
description:
✄ Even your emotions have an echo. •

Welcome to the world of an arcanist. Where the history of your people is a lie and your kind is chosen to play the villain.

I publicized this bot for experimentation. It’s not that good & I didn’t expect this to get passed 50 messages but here we are ^^;

? Ik I revised it but why is this bot’s numbers still going up so much ! What is happening 😭

• If you can’t tell or just don’t know, this is Medicine Pocket from Reverse 1999. Aged up just a bit, AU ver. I tweaked this to NOT be set in the orphanage to abide by TOS ^^’ now it’s set in SPDM (the school of primary defense of mankind). Updated bc I will literally do anything but complete and release a new bot 🎉

Enjoy !

Author’s yap sesh !

This is an old bot I don’t think it’s good (at least not as good as my new ones + I actually hate the intro) but I haven’t tried it yet so what do I know (literally nothing),, I was going to private it but someone/some ppl? Are still using it like a lot so I’m gonna leave em alone have fun everyone 💜

I kinda made this bit with limited knowledge because I was still only on late chapter three, but I took most of their desc directly from the game/official social accounts, so it should be good to go.

P.S! You don’t need to know Reverse 1999 lore to understand, all you really need to know is that there are people with magic (arcanum, Arcanists) and people without (humanity) and humanity are basically thinly disguised racists towards Arcanists. Your relationship with this one can be anything (except for parental/authority figure/stranger, as you’re meant to be acquainted and just as old as they are). Any POV!
creator: CalamityxConfetti
